title: Create The Creator
description:
Its a Create modpack with many mods of create and optimization mods

A stream project is currently being planned on Twitch
More information is available on Discord
body:
This modpack is filled with many mods like Create, Embeddium, TACZ, and much more

Also there are some special features like

```
Embeddium
Oculus
Prism
e4mc
Wavey Capes
AmbientSounds
Create Track Map
Simple Voicechat

and much more optimization mods
```


Its an beginning of an Streaming row and you can see all Live streams in **Streams** on the Discord server

At the moment there are still some problems with the first version of the modpack, so Continuity is currently removed

In later versions of the modpack NEC (Not Enough Crashes) will be added to prevent entire game crashing

If there are still several problems, please either solve a ticket on the Discord server or write in the Error/Bugs report
